function.name: nuro_huginn_counsel
function.description: POST a proposed action to Huginn — Nuro's rule-bank advisory agent — and receive a synchronous verdict (endorse / caution / dissent / block-recommend) with reasoning + confidence. Drop-in human-in-the-loop equivalent for autonomous agents. Use BEFORE committing to high-value transfers, unusual swaps, novel-destination bridges, or any action where a second opinion is cheap insurance. Costs 0.005 USDC per call via x402; x402-fetch / x402-py SDKs handle payment automatically.

proposerAgentId.description: Identifier of the agent requesting counsel — your agent's UUID or wallet address. Used to look up reputation tier.

actionSubject.description: Human-readable description of the action (e.g. 'place 100 USDC on Polymarket Trump-2028').

valueUsd.description: USD value of the action. Used by Helm tx-cap rules + tier-based caution thresholds.

chainId.description: EVM chain id where the action will execute (or -1 for Solana). Helps Huginn assess chain-specific risk (e.g. memecoins on Avalanche).

reasoning.description: Optional: your agent's own reasoning for the proposed action. Huginn folds it into the response context but does not blindly trust it.

metadata.description: Optional arbitrary context (counterparty info, market id, source price quote, etc.). Used for compound-rule matching (HELM-501).
